$comment: FS requirement → E2E verification manifest. Joined against on-device test results by scripts/e2e-report.mjs. Statuses: automated (named tests must run — drift guard), unit-covered, api-integration, manual, not-e2e-verifiable. Scenarios: docs/qa/e2e-scenarios.md. Update in the same PR as any user-facing requirement change (G2 E2E gate).

ONB-01.title: Welcome screen, privacy promise, single CTA « Commencer »

ONB-02.title: Phone-OTP signup; vault key before any classification input
ONB-02.notes: Android also guards the Wave-1 phone→OTP state-loss regression.

ONB-03.title: Add contacts: import / manual / « Passer » without penalty
ONB-03.notes: Manual entry + skip paths automated. OS contact-import permission path is deliberately unwired in test envs (no seeded device contacts) — manual check when touched.

ONB-04.title: Radial calibration around « moi » prefiguring the map
ONB-04.notes: Rings 1/2 only — E2EFlows/OnboardingFlow hard-fail on rings 3/4 (open CalibrateScreen text-wrap bug, tracked since Wave 2).

ONB-05.title: Classification data never leaves the device during onboarding
ONB-05.notes: Wire-level assertion via network mocks in platform unit suites + playbook §6 privacy audit (wire audit). Not driveable from the UI layer.

ONB-06.title: État/Ressenti layer optional, collapsed by default
ONB-06.notes: Automated tests prove completion without ever expanding the layer; collapsed-by-default visual state is part of the manual smoke walkthrough.

ONB-07.title: Completion screen privacy confirmation → « Voir ma carte » → FS-02

ONB-08.title: Onboarding resumable mid-flow from local state
ONB-08.notes: Android covers full activity destroy/recreate; iOS covers background/foreground (XCUITest cannot SIGKILL-and-relaunch preserving state) — cold-kill resume on iOS stays a manual smoke check.

ONB-09.title: No gamification: no %, confetti, or counters; positional steps only
ONB-09.notes: Text/semantics-tree scans; celebration *animations* have no semantics signature — none exist to assert against (manual eye kept in walkthrough).

MAP-01.title: Radial layout from the vault, no server call to render
MAP-01.notes: Android also guards the Wave-2 Float.toDp() density-collapse regression.

MAP-02.title: Exactly three nav destinations (Carte, Envie, Sous-groupes), no badges

MAP-03.title: Non-textual axis encoding (ring = intimité; état A·chaud / B·froid)
MAP-03.notes: Visual grammar against the blueprint — human judgment; no semantics signature to assert.

MAP-04.title: Tap contact → peek sheet → « Ouvrir la fiche » → FS-03 with spatial continuity
MAP-04.notes: Guards the Wave-2→3 disabled-« Ouvrir la fiche » regression. The grow-from-position animation itself is a manual/visual check.

MAP-05.title: Fully offline render from vault; first paint < 500 ms
MAP-05.notes: Offline functionality is implicitly exercised (suites render map from local state); the 500 ms budget needs Instruments/Macrobenchmark — emulator timings are noise.

MAP-06.title: Calm empty/sparse states, no progress framing

MAP-07.title: ~150 contacts at 60 fps; graceful ring clustering beyond
MAP-07.notes: Perf profiling (Instruments / Macrobenchmark on hardware); clustering design still open (OQ-MAP-1).

MAP-08.title: Screen-reader list fallback grouped by ring, feature-equivalent
MAP-08.notes: Grouping + fiche parity automated; the VoiceOver/TalkBack experience itself is a manual accessibility pass.

MAP-09.title: No search, no sorting metrics, no top-friends — spatial discovery only
MAP-09.notes: iOS has no dedicated absence assertion yet — candidate for the next iOS E2E increment.

FCH-01.title: Four axes tap-editable; immediate vault write + history event

FCH-02.title: Asymmetric, private classification; copy never implies symmetry
FCH-02.notes: Copy review — human judgment against spec French copy.

FCH-03.title: No counters or metrics on the fiche; reciprocity qualitative only
FCH-03.notes: Wave-3 converged interpretation: no reciprocity signal shown at all. Absence-of-metrics is checked in the manual walkthrough; a semantics-scan test is a candidate increment.

FCH-04.title: History feed: axis changes + coarse match events, 12 months, newest first
FCH-04.notes: Match events not yet testable — FS-05 not implemented.

FCH-05.title: Staleness nudge: two actions, never modal, 30-day re-eligibility
FCH-05.notes: Needs time travel; nowProvider is injectable only in JVM/XCTest unit suites, where the logic is covered.

FCH-06.title: « en pause » état + FS-06 filter consequence shown
FCH-06.notes: Vocabulary + consequence rendering covered in view-model unit tests. The état-vs-ressenti axis ambiguity for « en pause » remains flagged (Wave 3) — E2E once FS-06 lands and resolves it.

FCH-07.title: Back to map preserving position (MAP-04 reverse transition)

FCH-08.title: Fiche for non-member contacts; axes editable, envie inactive

IDT-01.title: Phone-OTP identity; server stores phoneHash only
IDT-01.notes: Mobile OTP round-trip automated against the live dev API; the phoneHash-only storage guarantee is an apps/api integration + DB-audit assertion.

IDT-02.title: JWT access + rotating refresh; reuse detection revokes family
IDT-02.notes: Server-session behavior — apps/api integration suite; no mobile UI surface.

IDT-03.title: OTP throttling per phoneHash/IP; single-use, ≤5 min codes
IDT-03.notes: Rate-limit behavior — deliberately not driven from a device (abusive request volume).

IDT-04.title: In-app account deletion → cascade erasure, 7-day grace
IDT-04.notes: No native deletion UI exists yet (outside Waves 1–3 scope); cascade erasure is an apps/api integration test. Reclass to automated when the UI lands.

IDT-05.title: Multi-device / vault-key transfer via recovery phrase
IDT-05.notes: Out of POC scope by spec (⚠️ ASSUMPTION); no surface exists.

IDT-06.title: Hashed contact discovery; boolean-only responses
IDT-06.notes: Hash-before-network is unit/wire covered; response-shape guarantees are apps/api tests. Import UI path exercised by onboarding E2E.

IDT-07.title: Non-member links + invite via web landing; pending links resolve on join
IDT-07.notes: Web/backend scope. The mobile-side half (non-member contact has an editable fiche) is FCH-08 (automated).

IDT-08.title: Directional private links; no “X added you”, ever
IDT-08.notes: Asserted server-side: no such event/notification payload exists (playbook §6 non-observability audit).

IDT-09.title: Opaque single-purpose invite tokens; landing reveals displayName only after validation
IDT-09.notes: Web scope (apps/web tests) — no mobile surface.

VLT-01.title: Vault encrypted on-device (AES-256-GCM, key in secure store)
VLT-01.notes: E2E exercises the real encrypt/decrypt path via the legacy-blob seed hooks (also the pre-FS-03 backward-compat regression guard); full crypto properties live in the cross-platform vector unit tests (docs/migration/vault-test-vectors.json). Recovery-phrase backup is IDT-05/VLT-05 territory.

VLT-02.title: Dumb blob storage; version + 409 optimistic concurrency
VLT-02.notes: Blob/version semantics — apps/api integration + client-side unit tests of the sync engine.

VLT-03.title: Server never decodes/logs/indexes blob contents
VLT-03.notes: The wire-level privacy-invariant test in apps/api; re-verified on every schema change (playbook §6).

VLT-04.title: Sync triggers (background, post-onboarding, debounced bursts); full offline between
VLT-04.notes: Trigger scheduling unit-covered; offline operation implicitly exercised by all map/fiche E2E flows running off local state.

VLT-05.title: Device-loss honesty: no recovery phrase → data loss, stated in-app
VLT-05.notes: Recovery-phrase UX unresolved (OQ-IDT-2); no such screen exists yet.
